title: Stitch fidelity: Task Creation Dark (/tasks/new)
description: frontend-agent remediates the Task Creation (Dark) route only per Stitch id 0caac050ee504d6ebca41d202bbd1ca7. Dark theme remains scoped to this segment; form aligns to PNG/HTML and ui_spec. Wire to todo Server Actions from 05 as required. CSS Modules + tokens; no Material.
acceptance: Route /tasks/new matches canonical Stitch screen id 0caac050ee504d6ebca41d202bbd1ca7: parity with projects/todo-reference/design/stitch/screens/0caac050ee504d6ebca41d202bbd1ca7.png and projects/todo-reference/design/stitch/code/0caac050ee504d6ebca41d202bbd1ca7.html for the dark task-creation form and surrounding layout.
Section order, field layout, and primary affordances match the Task Creation (Dark) slice in projects/todo-reference/tasks/todo-mvp/07-ui-generator-stitch-four-screens/artifacts/ui_spec.json.
Dark presentation applies only within this route subtree (layout/segment); other MVP routes remain light per architecture-brief.
Todo create/update actions remain integrated with 05-backend-server-actions-integration; behavior unchanged except where presentation must match Stitch.
Styling uses CSS Modules and shared tokens; no Material components or Material visual defaults.
Accessibility: labels, errors, and keyboard submission path per ui_spec.
100% unit test line coverage for any new pure UI logic in the declared unit scope per brief and coverage config.
Visual acceptance for implementers: QA §4.2 will require zero diff_ratio vs the canonical PNG; implement to that bar.
implementation_notes: Single-screen scope; do not alter global theme outside /tasks/new subtree.
